triples.subject: NVIDIA
triples.sentence: NVIDIA is increasing its quarterly cash dividend by 150% from $0.04 per share to $0.10 per share of common stock.

triples.subject: NVIDIA
triples.sentence: NVIDIA will conduct a conference call with analysts and investors to discuss its first quarter fiscal 2025 financial results and current financial prospects today at 2 p.m.

triples.subject: NVIDIA
triples.sentence: Trading is expected to commence on a split-adjusted basis at market open on Monday, June 10, 2024.

triples.subject: NVIDIA
triples.sentence: The increased dividend is equivalent to $0.01 per share on a post-split basis and will be paid on Friday, June 28, 2024, to all shareholders of record on Tuesday, June 11, 2024.
